settings.quote: "We do not simply build brands; we architect legacies of excellence rooted in true identity."

settings.heading: The Creative Academy
settings.lead: Excellence is not an industry; it is an identity. The Creative Academy is an exclusive guild designed for visionaries across all sectors who seek to master their craft and live a "dream realized."
settings.body: Under the direct mentorship of Nancy Vuu, students are coached through a rigorous curriculum of spiritual identity, technical precision, and strategic brand architecture. This is not a mass-market course—it is an invitation-only incubator with limited annual enrollment.

settings.title: Identity & Vision Mastery
settings.description: Applicable to all industries—from technology to the arts. We mentor you on the spiritual and practical foundation of identity.
settings.features: Sovereign Leadership Coaching|Excellence as a Mandate|Strategic Vision Boarding

settings.title: The Fashion Professional
settings.description: A high-level technical track for aspiring models. Building elite portfolios and providing direct industry placement.
settings.features: Elite Portfolio Development|Direct Internship Opportunities|Agency Preparation

settings.title: The Brand Architect
settings.description: Nancy Vuu guides you from brand DNA and development to connecting you with high-end sourcing and manufacturing.

settings.heading: Dream Expo Global
settings.subtitle: The Platform of Realization
settings.body: The world is your runway. Dream Expo is the platform where our students and partners showcase their talent to the world.

settings.heading: Vuu Publishing
settings.body: Helping visionaries architect their message into world-class publications. Turn your story and expertise into a professional publication that leaves a lasting legacy.

settings.heading: Women CEO Collective
settings.body: An elite network for high-level female executives and founders. We facilitate connections that transcend standard networking, focused on spiritual leadership and global impact.

settings.heading: The Global Collective
settings.lead: Join the House of Vuu as a brand architect. We are opening our doors to fans and clients to build the future of excellence with us.
settings.body: Our Brand Ambassadors are more than representatives—they are partners in prosperity. Through a curated commission-based model, you champion the Vuu standard while creating your own financial legacy.
settings.floating_quote: "Your success is woven into the fabric of our house."

settings.title: Commission
settings.description: Direct profit participation on every legacy piece you represent.

settings.title: Curated Assets
settings.description: Access to exclusive marketing tools and high-fashion assets.
